# SCSITaskMode

**Enumeration**

## Declaration

```swift
typedef enum SCSITaskMode : unsigned int {
    ...
} SCSITaskMode;
```

## Overview

The SCSI Task mode is used by the SCSI Protocol Layer to indicate what mode the task is executing.
